title: Workspace .env STATE_DIRECTORY not blocked, influencing bundled runtime dependency roots
description: In src/infra/dotenv.ts the guard shouldBlockWorkspaceDotEnvKey() decides whether a key parsed from an untrusted workspace .env file may be loaded into the runtime environment, rejecting only keys that appear in the BLOCKED_WORKSPACE_DOTENV_KEYS allow-deny set (or matching blocked prefixes/suffixes). At the vulnerable release the set did not include STATE_DIRECTORY, so a workspace .env opened by a trusted operator could set STATE_DIRECTORY before bundled runtime dependency root resolution, redirecting where the runtime loads its bundled dependencies from a local state path the operator did not intend.
